category.name: Crawlability
category.rule: No XML sitemap found
No robots.txt found

category.name: Core SEO
category.rule: Title too short Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (Grupo 6 Solutions (17 chars))
Description too short Pages (1): / Items (1): - / (Equipo de desarrolladores de software a medida, es (98 chars))
Missing canonical URL Pages (1): /
No favicon found Pages (1): /

category.name: Security
category.rule: No Content-Security-Policy header
Missing Strict-Transport-Security header
No clickjacking protection

1 HTTP URL(s) redirect to HTTPS Items (1): - http://grupo6s.com/ (http://grupo6s.com/ → https://grupo6s.com/ (301)) [statusCode: 301, chain: {"sourceUrl":"http://grupo6s.com/","finalUrl":"https://grupo6s.com/","hops":[{"url":"http://grupo6s.com/","statusCode":301,"type":"http"},{"url":"https://grupo6s.com/","statusCode":200,"type":"http"}…]

category.name: Links
category.rule: 5 broken external link(s): 5 with 999 Items (5): - https://www.linkedin.com/in/nkaminski-profile/ (https://www.linkedin.com/in/nkaminski-profile/ (999)) [status: 999] (from: /) - https://www.linkedin.com/in/ariel-ayala-49006823a/ (https://www.linkedin.com/in/ariel-ayala-49006823a/ (999)) [status: 999] (from: /) - https://www.linkedin.com/in/b%C3%A1rbara-ponce/ (https://www.linkedin.com/in/b%C3%A1rbara-ponce/ (999)) [status: 999] (from: /) - https://www.linkedin.com/in/nahuel-roman-168320287/ (https://www.linkedin.com/in/nahuel-roman-168320287/ (999)) [status: 999] (from: /) - https://www.linkedin.com/in/calipto-martinez-4a2754276/ (https://www.linkedin.com/in/calipto-martinez-4a2754276/ (999)) [status: 999] (from: /)

category.name: Images
category.rule: 23 below-fold image(s) without lazy loading Pages (1): / Items (5/10): - 3178C6 - 339933 - 000000 - 3E67B1 - E8372D

26 image(s) missing width/height (causes CLS) Pages (1): / Items (5/26): - /images/logoExagonoD.png | - /images/geclau.jpg | - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/react/61DAFB | - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/typescript/3178C6 | - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/nodedotjs/339933 |

category.name: Performance
category.rule: 3 potential LCP image(s) without preload Pages (1): / Items (3): - images/logoExagonoD.png - images/geclau.jpg - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/react/61DAFB

26 image(s) without width/height (CLS risk) Pages (1): / Items (5/26): - images/logoExagonoD.png - images/geclau.jpg - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/react/61DAFB - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/typescript/3178C6 - https://cdn.simpleicons.org/nodedotjs/339933

2 critical request chain(s) found Pages (1): / Items (2): - CSS: https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap - CSS: style.css
1 JavaScript file(s) appear unminified Pages (1): / Items (1): - script.js (4.8KB, ~1.5KB savings) [reason: high newlines (3.05%), long variable names, formatted code, excessive whitespace]

category.name: Accessibility
category.rule: 1 element(s) where visible text doesn't match accessible name Pages (1): / Items (1): - button: visible="☰" vs aria-label="abrir menú"

category.name: E-E-A-T
category.rule: No About page found
No content pages have author attribution
No Contact page found
No Privacy Policy page found
No content pages have datePublished

category.name: Legal Compliance
category.rule: No privacy policy link found across site
